stemHtml: An aeroplane pilot is taking a course of training to upgrade from Co-Pilot to Commander. This command course contains many training elements, one of which is to complete.

options.a: Training in an FSTD, which includes LOFT training.
options.b: Line training under the supervision for at least 8 flight sectors.
options.c: At least 5 hours of training in an FSTD, followed by line training in any aircraft.
options.d: At least 10 hours of training in an FSTD, which includes LOFT training.
